old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-uzsj","title":"NDP messages must require hop_limit=255 per RFC 4861","description":"File: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:775-802

The Neighbor Solicitation handler in handle_icmpv6() does not validate that the IPv6 hop_limit is 255 before processing.

Per RFC 4861 Section 6.1.1 (Neighbor Solicitation validation):
- The IP Hop Limit field has a value of 255, i.e., the packet could not possibly have been forwarded by a router.

And RFC 4861 Section 6.1.2 (Neighbor Advertisement validation):
- The IP Hop Limit field has a value of 255

Current code (lines 775-777):
```rust
icmpv6_type::NEIGHBOR_SOLICITATION => {
    let ns = NeighborSolicitation::from_bytes(body)?;
    // No hop_limit check!
```

Impact: An attacker could send spoofed NS/NA messages from a remote network, bypassing the link-local security assumption of Neighbor Discovery. This could enable:
- Address spoofing (claiming to be another node)
- Denial of service (incorrect neighbor cache entries)
- Man-in-the-middle attacks

Fix: Add validation at the start of NS/NA handling:
```rust
if ip_header.hop_limit != 255 {
    return Ok(None); // Silently drop per RFC 4861
}
```","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:14:10.384709Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:14:10.384747Z"}

And RFC 4861 Section 6.1.2 (Neighbor Advertisement validation):

Current code (lines 775-777):
```rust

    let ns = NeighborSolicitation::from_bytes(body)?;
    // No hop_limit check!
```

Impact: An attacker could send spoofed NS/NA messages from a remote network, bypassing the link-local security assumption of Neighbor Discovery. This could enable:
- Address spoofing (claiming to be another node)
- Denial of service (incorrect neighbor cache entries)
- Man-in-the-middle attacks

Fix: Add validation at the start of NS/NA handling:
```rust
if ip_header.hop_limit != 255 {
    return Ok(None); // Silently drop per RFC 4861
}
```","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:14:10.384709Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:09:21.073891674Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:09:21.073891674Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:14:21.073891674Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:09:21.073891674Z"}

new_value: Added hop_limit==255 validation for NEIGHBOR_SOLICITATION and NEIGHBOR_ADVERTISEMENT in handle_icmpv6 per RFC 4861. Tests and clippy pass. Commit 061ea0109
